name: GH_ComponentServer
summary: Maintains proxies for all components, parameters and other object types as defined in all grasshopper assemblies.

constructors.name: GH_ComponentServer
constructors.summary: Initializes a new instance of the GH_ComponentServer class

methods.name: AddAlias
methods.signature: public void AddAlias(string alias, Guid target)
methods.summary: Add an alias to a target.

params.name: alias
params.doc: Alias to add. If the alias string contains spaces or commas, those will be used to harvest partial aliases.

params.name: target
params.doc: Component ID of object that is targeted by the alias.

methods.name: AddCategoryIcon
methods.signature: public void AddCategoryIcon(string fullCategoryName, Bitmap icon)
methods.summary: Add an icon for a tab category. 16x16 images are required.

params.name: fullCategoryName
params.doc: The full name of the category.

params.name: icon
params.doc: the icon to display on the tab (has to be a 16x16 image).

methods.name: AddCategoryShortName
methods.signature: public void AddCategoryShortName(string fullCategoryName, string categoryAbbreviation)
methods.summary: Add an abbreviation for a tab category. 2~4 letter abbreviations are best.

params.name: fullCategoryName
params.doc: The full name of the category.

params.name: categoryAbbreviation
params.doc: The abbreviation to display on the tab.

methods.name: AddCategorySymbolName
methods.signature: public void AddCategorySymbolName(string fullCategoryName, char symbol)
methods.summary: Add a single char category description.

params.name: fullCategoryName
params.doc: The full name of the category.

params.name: symbol
params.doc: The single char representing the category.

methods.name: AliasTargets
methods.summary: Get all the target Component IDs for a given alias.

params.name: alias
params.doc: Alias to search for.

methods.name: Clear
methods.summary: Clear all caches.

methods.name: ClearStaleUserObjects
methods.summary: Remove all user objects that no longer point to existing files.

methods.name: CompareProxies
methods.signature: public static int CompareProxies(IGH_ObjectProxy A, IGH_ObjectProxy B)
methods.summary: Compare two object proxies. Names and exposures are taken into account.

params.name: A
params.doc: First proxy to compare.

params.name: B
params.doc: Second proxy to compare.

returns.doc: -1 if A is valued lower than B, 0 if A and B are considered equal, +1 if A is valued higher than B.

methods.name: CopyFileToAppropriateFolder
methods.signature: public static string CopyFileToAppropriateFolder(string filepath, bool moveOriginalToBin)
methods.summary: Copy a GHA or GHUSER file into the appropriate Roaming Application Data folder. Of the file is already in the top-level roaming folder it will not be copied.

params.name: filepath
params.doc: The file to copy.

params.name: moveOriginalToBin
params.doc: If true, the original file will be placed in the recycle bin upon a successful copy.

returns.doc: The path of the copied file.

methods.name: DestroyLoadingUI
methods.summary: Destroy the loading UI (the banner and the progress bar).

methods.name: EmitGraph
methods.summary: Create a new instance of the IGH_Graph that matches the id. If no proxy can be matched to the id, a null reference will be returned.

params.name: id
params.doc: The graph type id to instantiate

methods.name: EmitObject
methods.summary: Create a new instance of the IGH_DocumentObject that matches the id. If no proxy can be matched to the id, a null reference will be returned.

params.name: id
params.doc: The component type id to instantiate

methods.name: EmitObjectIcon
methods.summary: Get the icon that is associated with the given Object ID.

params.name: id
params.doc: ID to search for.

returns.doc: Icon of object or null if object is not defined or if object does not have an icon.

methods.name: EmitObjectProxy
methods.summary: Get the proxy that is associated with the given Object ID.

params.name: id
params.doc: ID to search for.

methods.name: ExternalFiles
methods.signature: public static List<GH_ExternalFile> ExternalFiles(bool testGrasshopperCollisions, bool testExternalCollisions)
methods.summary: Get lists of all the external files (GHA, GHUSER and GHCLUSTER) that will be loaded by Grasshopper. Note: this does not equal the files that may already have been loaded, just the files that we'll attempt to load if we were asked to load all plugins now. The list contains no duplicate file paths, but it may contain identical files which won't be filtered until actual loading.

params.name: testGrasshopperCollisions
params.doc: If true, invalid duplicates of Grasshopper.dll will be tested for and warned about.

params.name: testExternalCollisions
params.doc: If true, duplicates of GHA, GHUSER and GHCLUSTER files will be tested for and warned about.

methods.name: FindAssembly
methods.summary: Gets the assembly that corresponds to the given library ID.

params.name: libraryId
params.doc: Library ID to search for.

returns.doc: The library info, or null if the ID is not registered.

methods.name: FindAssemblyByObject(Guid)
methods.summary: Gets the assembly that corresponds to the given library ID.

params.name: objectId
params.doc: The object ComponentGuid.

returns.doc: The library info, or null if the ID is not registered.

methods.name: FindAssemblyByObject(IGH_DocumentObject)
methods.summary: Gets the assembly that corresponds to the given library ID.

params.name: object
params.doc: Object.

returns.doc: The library info, or null if the ID is not registered.

methods.name: FindObjectByName
methods.signature: public IGH_ObjectProxy FindObjectByName(string name, bool ignoreWhiteSpace, bool ignoreCapitalisation)
methods.summary: Find an object by name. Obsolete and hidden objects are ignored. Only exact matches are included.

params.name: name
params.doc: Name to search for. Name may be prefixed by Category and Subcategory.

params.name: ignoreWhiteSpace
params.doc: If true, whitespace is ignored during matching.

params.name: ignoreCapitalisation
params.doc: If true, capitalisation is ignored during matching.

returns.doc: The proxy that matches the name, or null if no such object could be found.

methods.name: FindObjects(Guid)
methods.summary: Find all the objects that are part of a certain library.

params.name: libraryID
params.doc: ID of library to search for.

returns.doc: A list of all the objects that are defined in the specified library.

methods.name: FindObjects(String[], Int32, IGH_ObjectProxy[], Double[])
methods.signature: public int FindObjects(string[] terms, int maximumResults, ref IGH_ObjectProxy[] results, ref double[] resultWeights)
methods.summary: Searches the list of cached object proxies for objects that might be implied by a search term.

params.name: terms
params.doc: Search terms to use.

params.name: maximumResults
params.doc: Maximum number of allowed hits.

returns.doc: A sorted list of search results.

methods.name: FindUpgrader
methods.summary: Find the upgrader that can convert from the given target.

params.name: target
params.doc: ComponentID of object to upgrade.

returns.doc: Matching upgrader or null if no upgrader is defined.

methods.name: GetAlias
methods.summary: Gets the alias display string for a given object.

params.name: target
params.doc: Object id to retrieve aliases for.

returns.doc: A parsable display string of aliases.

methods.name: GetCategoryIcon
methods.summary: Get the icon for a specific category. If the icon hasn't been defined, this method will return the default icon.

params.name: fullName
params.doc: Full name of category.

returns.doc: The category icon.

methods.name: GetCategoryShortName
methods.summary: Get the abbreviation (short name) for a specific category. If the short name hasn't been defined, this method will return the full name instead.

params.name: fullName
params.doc: Full name of category.

returns.doc: The abbreviated name or the full name.

methods.name: GetCategorySymbolName
methods.summary: Get the single char representation for a specific category. If the char hasn't been defined, this method will return the first char of the full name instead.

params.name: fullName
params.doc: Full name of category.

returns.doc: The category char.

methods.name: IsGraphCached
methods.summary: Tests the graph cache for an existing graph type ID.

params.name: id
params.doc: The ID to test for.

returns.doc: True if the ID is cached, false if it aint.

methods.name: IsObjectCached
methods.summary: Tests the caches for an existing object type ID.

params.name: id
params.doc: The ID to test for.

returns.doc: True if the ID is cached, false if it aint.

methods.name: IsUpgrader
methods.summary: Checks to see if at least one upgrader is defined for a collection of objects.

methods.name: LoadAliases
methods.summary: Load the Alias table from the settings directory. Only use this function if you suspect the alias table settings file has changed due to some external process.

methods.name: NewUserObject
methods.summary: Create a new UserObject and write it to the Grasshopper User Object folder.

params.name: obj
params.doc: Object to write.

returns.doc: True on success, false on failure.

methods.name: RemoveCachedGraph
methods.summary: Remove a cache entry from the graph cache. This cannot be undone.

params.name: id
params.doc: The id to remove.

returns.doc: True on success, false on failure.

methods.name: RemoveCachedObject(Guid)
methods.summary: Remove a cache entry from the object cache. This cannot be undone.

params.name: id
params.doc: The id to remove.

returns.doc: True on success, false on failure.

methods.name: RemoveCachedObject(String)
methods.summary: Remove the user object (if any) that loads itself from a specified *.ghuser file.

params.name: userObjectFilePath
params.doc: File name path of user object proxy.

returns.doc: True if an object proxy was removed, false if not.

methods.name: SaveAliases
methods.summary: Save the alias table to the settings directory. Use this function if you change the alias table while ignoring usual channels.

methods.name: SetAlias
methods.signature: public void SetAlias(string alias, Guid target)
methods.summary: Sets the aliases for a given target.

params.name: alias
params.doc: Alias to add. If the alias string contains spaces or commas, those will be used to harvest partial aliases. Use a zero-length alias to remove all aliases to the target.

params.name: target
params.doc: Component ID of object that is targeted by the alias.

methods.name: UpdateRibbonUI
methods.summary: Forces an update of the Ribbon control on the Grasshopper main form.

properties.name: Aliases
properties.summary: Gets a list of all the defined aliases.

properties.name: CompleteRibbonLayout
properties.summary: Gets the default component layout featuring all non-hidden components and parameters.

properties.name: DiscardedProxies
properties.summary: Returns the total number of IGH_DocumentObjects that were discarded during assembly parsing. This includes both skipped and replaced proxies.

properties.name: GraphProxies
properties.summary: Returns a list of all cached GH_GraphProxy instances.

properties.name: Libraries
properties.summary: Returns a list of Assembly Info objects describing all loaded assemblies.

properties.name: LoadingExceptions
properties.summary: Gets a list of all the exceptions that were recorded during the most recent loading sequence.

properties.name: ObjectProxies
properties.summary: Returns a list of all cached GH_ObjectProxy instances.

properties.name: ObjectProxyNames
properties.summary: Returns a specialized string collection of all component names.
properties.remarks: This property is used for autocompletion in textboxes.

properties.name: TypeHints
properties.summary: Gets a list of all IGH_TypeHint types in all loaded assemblies.

properties.name: Upgraders
properties.summary: Gets a list of all the upgraders that have been cached.

events.name: GHAFileLoaded
events.summary: Raised whenever a GHA file has been successfully loaded.
